summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: right triangle at origin with 3 squares (RED a², BLUE b², GREEN c²) on each side. ValueTrackers a_tr, b_tr drive the legs; always_redraw rebuilds geometry + inline area labels each frame. 5-config tour (3,4), (1.5, 3.5), (2.5, 2.5), (4, 1), (3, 2). Live panel has a, b, c, a²+b², c².
